calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert H. Staley, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Capurro Properties, LLC Series D.
Stephen Capurro, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Monkey Thump, Inc., or Bruce Nelson.
Dismissal with prejudice as to defendant David Bryant was filed on May 12, 2010.
Defaults as to defendants Monkey Thump, Inc., and Bruce Nelson were entered on April 1, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 30, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Capurro Properties, LLC Series D, and against the Defaulted Defendants Monkey Thump, Inc., and Bruce Nelson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $356,585.68.
Attorney's Fees - $7,000.00.
Costs - $1,177.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $364,762.68.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-30-2010 Continued To Jul-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Continued To Aug-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
